children.name: about.txt
children.content: Software Engineer specializing in backend systems, cloud-native applications, and AI-powered platforms. Experienced in building REST APIs, event-driven architectures, RAG systems, multi-agent workflows, and scalable cloud deployments using Python, FastAPI, AWS, GCP, Docker, Kubernetes, Redis, and MongoDB.

children.name: hitachi_digital_services.txt
children.content:
Graduate Engineer Trainee (Intern) | Hitachi Digital Services | Feb 2026 – Present
- Developed backend services and REST APIs for an AWS-based Incident Reporting System using RDS, DynamoDB, Lambda, SNS, and ALB.
- Engineered event-driven workflows utilizing DynamoDB Streams and AWS Lambda for automated incident processing and notifications.
- Containerized backend applications using Docker and Amazon ECR, improving deployment consistency across environments.
- Implemented CI/CD workflows using Jenkins and Kubernetes-based deployments for automated application delivery.
- Worked with cloud networking concepts including load balancing, traffic routing, and distributed application deployment.

children.name: vitals7.txt
children.content:
Software Development Intern | Vitals7, Inc. | May 2025 – Jan 2026
- Contributed to a microservices-based healthcare platform, developing REST APIs with FastAPI for appointment scheduling, provider availability, and patient management.
- Built timezone-aware scheduling capabilities supporting secure cross-region patient-provider interactions.
- Integrated AWS Cognito authentication and authorization for secure access management.
- Developed backend services using Python and AWS Lambda while collaborating with healthcare domain experts and cross-functional teams.

children.name: phn_technology.txt
children.content:
Web Development Intern | PHN Technology Pvt. Ltd. | Apr 2023 – Jun 2023
- Developed responsive web applications using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Bootstrap.
- Implemented modular UI components and dynamic DOM manipulation.
- Built responsive, cross-browser layouts ensuring consistent performance across devices.

children.name: smartrevise.txt
children.content:
SmartRevise - Multi-Agent AI Platform | FastAPI, LangChain, Pinecone, Redis, MongoDB, GCP | Oct 2025 – Present
- Designed and developed a multi-agent AI platform supporting document research, web search, coding assistance, debugging workflows, and citation-backed question answering.
- Built an LLM orchestration layer capable of selecting among multiple actions including RAG retrieval, web search, and tool execution workflows.
- Implemented dual-level retrieval architecture using Pinecone semantic search, document embeddings, and page-level citation tracking.
- Developed an asynchronous document ingestion pipeline using Google Pub/Sub and Cloud Run worker services for scalable PDF processing.
- Implemented Redis-backed conversational memory, reducing MongoDB session-history reads by up to ~99% and improving end-to-end response latency by ~9–14%.
- Added real-time Server-Sent Events (SSE) streaming for agent responses and durable workflow state management.
- Automated deployments using GitHub Actions, Cloud Build, Artifact Registry, and Cloud Run.

children.name: taskgpt.txt
children.content:
taskGPT - AI Task Agent CLI | Python, PyPI, Docker, OpenAI, Gemini | Apr 2025
- Built and published a Python CLI tool on PyPI for executing AI-powered task workflows.
- Developed agent-driven planning that converts natural language requests into structured command execution plans.
- Designed custom JSON schemas and workflow definitions for multi-step task execution and AI-assisted troubleshooting.
- Implemented automated first-run setup, API key management, environment configuration, and Docker-based packaging.
- Added AI-driven error diagnosis, recovery workflows, and bounded retry mechanisms.

children.name: intelligent_assessment_system.txt
children.content:
Intelligent Assessment and Evaluation System | MERN Stack, MongoDB, Gemini | Dec 2024
- Built a scalable online assessment platform with real-time dashboards and performance analytics.
- Integrated Gemini-powered evaluation workflows to generate assessments and provide instant AI-driven feedback.
- Implemented timed assessments, automated submissions, tab-switch detection, and examination integrity features.
- Developed backend APIs and data models for managing student assessments and evaluation results.

children.name: skills.txt
children.content:
Programming Languages: Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, SQL, C++

Backend & APIs: FastAPI, Node.js, REST APIs, Microservices, Event-Driven Architectures, Server-Sent Events (SSE), API Design, Authentication (JWT/OAuth, Firebase Auth, AWS Cognito)

Cloud & DevOps: AWS (EC2, S3, ECR, RDS, DynamoDB, Lambda, SNS, Cognito, CloudFront, ALB), GCP (Cloud Run, Cloud Build, Pub/Sub, Artifact Registry), Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, GitHub Actions, Linux, CI/CD

Databases & Messaging: MongoDB, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis, DynamoDB, Google Pub/Sub

AI/ML & GenAI: Agentic AI, Multi-Agent Systems, LLM Orchestration, RAG Pipelines, LangChain, Pinecone, Vector Databases, OpenAI API, Gemini API, Prompt Engineering, Structured Outputs

Core CS: Data Structures & Algorithms, Object-Oriented Programming, DBMS, Operating Systems, Software Engineering

children.name: education.txt
children.content:
Bachelor of Engineering in Information Science (CGPA: 9.54) | Acharya Institute of Technology, Bengaluru | 2021 – 2025
Core Coursework: Data Structures & Algorithms, Object-Oriented Programming, Database Management Systems, Software Engineering, Operating Systems.

children.name: interests.txt
children.content: Backend Engineering, Distributed Systems, Cloud Infrastructure, DevOps, Agentic AI Systems, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Developer Tooling, Open Source.
